title: Conflict
description: Modpack designed to be ran as a multiplayer anarchy SMP. Includes a shop system economy mod and guns to encourage raiding and killing others for money and loot.
body:
A finely tuned modpack tailored for servers or LAN worlds with friends. This feature-packed experience includes an operational economy system with wallets and banking. Engage in strategic battles with the addition of firearms, enabling better raiding experiences to challenge your friends. Experience the adrenaline rush of elytra bombing, shooting, laying, and other general movement-based mods. This modpack was designed with warfare in mind, featuring numerous mods to encourage it.

 - **Primary Mods**
1. Timeless and Classics Guns - Press V when holding a gun to look at its attachments, H to inspect the weapon, R to reload the weapon, And for the rest simply go to your keybinds to change them.
2. JourneyMap - Press M to open the map.
3. Lightman's Currency - Press V to open your wallet where you can store your money.
4. Plasmo Voicechat - Press K to open the settings and hold the side mouse button to use the default push to talk.
5. Traveler's Backpack - Press B with a backpack on or in your inventory to open it.
6. GoProne - Press C to lay down.


 - **Secondary Mods**
1. Carry on - Crouch and rightclick on any storage blocks to pick them up and move them while keeping the items inside.
2. Colytra - Put your elytra and your chestplate in a crafting table to combind the two.
3. Elytra Bombing - Fly with your elytra, then right click with flint and steal with TNT in your inventory.
4. Equipment Compare - Hold shift while hoving a peace of armor to compare it to the one your wearing.
5. Sit - Right click on a slab to sit on it.
6. Mouse Tweaks - Hold shift and drag click over items to move many at a time.
7. First-person Model - Lets you see your legs.

The following mods are all off platform mods and there credits.\
_Corpse mod by henkelmax_ - 
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corpse \
_Elytra Bombing by MikhailTapio_ - 
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/elytra-bombing \
_Timeless and Classics Guns by TheRealClumsyAlien_ - 
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/timeless-and-classic-guns-tac \

*STRONGLY RECOMMEND A MINIMUM OF 2GB OF RAM IF RAN ON A SERVER.*\
While this modpack includes performance improvement mods, it is still resource-intensive.
